generation_note: Generated from Bulbapedia individual card page expansion metadata and release-information text. Exact set/number match is required; finish truth is emitted only for explicit finish/stamp/logo wording.

records.evidence_label: Bulbapedia card page release information stamp/logo variant
records.notes: Release information explicitly documents an English-scoped stamp/logo variant. Evidence: A Non Holofoil version of this card featuring a Pokémon 10th Anniversary stamp and an updated card template was later distributed at Journey Across America tour venues in 2006.

records.evidence_label: Bulbapedia card page release information stamp/logo variant
records.notes: Release information explicitly documents an English-scoped stamp/logo variant. Evidence: Winner versions of this card were also released, which feature a gold foil "Winner" stamp in the bottom right corner of the artwork.
